ogTitle: Dundowran Beach vs Dunk: Climate Safety

heading: Dundowran Beach vs Dunk — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dundowran Beach, Queensland and Dunk, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dunk has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Dundowran Beach (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dundowran Beach or Dunk safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dundowran Beach has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Dunk scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dundowran Beach scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Dunk scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dundowran Beach or Dunk?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dunk has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
